RABIES VACCINATION CLINIC The Stephens County Humane Society will host a second Rabies Vaccination Clinic on Tuesday, July 19.The clinic will be from 5:30 to 7:00 p.m. in the 500 block of East Hullum, at the red brick building (across the street from the Trade Days Barn). The rabies shots will cost $10 per animal for dogs and cats. No other exams or shots will be offered at that time.
